description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat, dark-shingled roof and a wood-textured exterior. The front facade includes a prominent white-framed door, two large rectangular windows above, and a smaller window to the left, all set within a clean, geometric layout. A short staircase leads up to the entrance, flanked by low, white stone planters with greenery. The sides and rear of the building are simpler, with fewer windows and a continuation of the wood paneling. The base of the structure is surrounded by a white stone border with patches of green vegetation. The overall appearance is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on straight lines and functional design.
description: A modern, boxy bungalow with a flat dark roof, wood-textured walls, large front windows, and a white stone base with greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large upper windows, a smaller left window, and a staircase with white stone planters.
description_view_1: Side view with a single window and visible stone base, plus stepping stones leading away from the building.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large, symmetrically placed windows and a plain wood-textured wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single wide window and the stone base, plus stepping stones visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with single side and rear windows
